subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, my Support and my Heart's Desire! I bear witness before Thee and Thy Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و سیدی و سندی و مقصودی اشهدک و رسلک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
